briefMarkdown: To: Executive Engineer, SWD Division, BBMP. Subject: Urgent Inspection Request: Choked Stormwater Drain, Agara Lake Vicinity (Location: 7J4VWJFQ, HSR Layout, Ward 174). This brief serves to escalate a critical drainage failure identified near Agara Lake. Our assessment assigns an impact score of 81/100, indicating a severe silent flood risk. Crucially, this location is a municipal BLIND SPOT; despite high structural risk, it lacks community visibility and reporting. The current choke poses an immediate threat to local infrastructure during seasonal rains. We request an urgent site inspection and prompt desilting/clearing operations to mitigate potential inundation. Your swift intervention is essential to prevent structural damage.
